essence: Installs, assembles, maintains, and repairs mechanical machinery and industrial equipment.

identity.title: Mechanical Fitter
identity.summary: Builds, installs, aligns, and repairs mechanical components and machinery across engineering, manufacturing, utilities, and industrial environments.

salary.notes: Fitters specialising in heavy industry, precision alignment, or hazardous environments can exceed £55k-£70k+.

qualifications: Training in mechanical engineering, fitting, or industrial maintenance
Knowledge of mechanical systems, components, and industrial machinery
Ability to read technical drawings and perform precision assembly
Understanding of safety procedures, alignment, and mechanical diagnostics

lifestyle.description: Mechanical fitters work in factories, utilities, engineering firms, and industrial plants. They assemble machinery, install components, diagnose faults, and perform repairs. The role suits individuals who enjoy hands‑on mechanical work, precision assembly, and maintaining industrial systems.

habits: Aligns shafts, bearings, and rotating equipment
Diagnoses mechanical faults and performs repairs
Conducts routine maintenance and safety checks
